Actions.Text: REFERRED TO NEW YORK CITY EDUCATION
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO NEW YORK CITY EDUCATION
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Relates to establishing school-based food pantries in schools in the city school district of the city of New York
Summary: Establishes school-based food pantries in high need schools in the city school district of the city of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, the state finance law and the tax law, in relation to establishing school-based food pantries in high-need schools in the city school district of the city of New York
